scheme_details.nodal_agency: Department for Promotion of Industry and Internal Trade (DPIIT)
scheme_details.ministry: Ministry of Commerce and Industry, Government of India
scheme_details.objective: To build a strong eco-system for nurturing innovation and Startups in the country that will drive sustainable economic growth and generate large scale employment opportunities.

eligibility_criteria.company_age: Up to 10 years from the date of incorporation.
eligibility_criteria.annual_turnover: Should not exceed Rs. 100 crore in any financial year (Revised limits up to Rs. 200/300 crore apply for specific categories like Deep Tech).
eligibility_criteria.original_entity: Should not be formed by splitting up or reconstructing an existing business.
eligibility_criteria.innovation_and_scalability: Must work towards development or improvement of a product, process, or service and have a scalable business model with high potential for wealth and employment generation.

tax_exemptions.income_tax: 100% deduction of profits under Section 80-IAC for 3 consecutive financial years out of the first 10 years.
tax_exemptions.angel_tax: Complete exemption from Angel Tax under Section 56(2)(viib) of the Income Tax Act.

ipr_support.fast_track_processing: Fast-tracking of patent applications with facilitator support.

funding_support: Startup India Seed Fund Scheme (SISFS) for proof of concept, prototype development, and product trials.
Fund of Funds for Startups (FFS) to infuse capital.
Credit Guarantee Scheme for Startups (CGSS) for collateral-free loans.
regulatory_ease: Self-certification compliance for 6 Labour Laws and 3 Environmental Laws.
Fast-track winding up of the company within 90 days under the Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code.

deep_tech_startups_special_rules_2026.extended_company_age: Recognition validity extended up to 20 years.
deep_tech_startups_special_rules_2026.higher_turnover_limit: Turnover limit increased up to Rs. 300 crore.
deep_tech_startups_special_rules_2026.key_focus: Scientific or technological advancements, high R&D investment, and IP development.

required_documents: Certificate of Incorporation or Partnership Deed
Brief Business Plan or Pitch Deck
Details of Patents or Trademarks (if any)
Annual Accounts and Income Tax returns (for existing businesses)
registration_and_documents.registration_platform: National Single Window System (NSWS) / Startup India Portal
